accreditation: NAAC accredited, ISO 9001:2015 certified, Pharmacy Council of India approved
vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice based School of Pharmacy that others would wish to emulate.
mission_elements: To implement the Outcome Based Education (OBE) model to conform to our belief 'Students Learn What We Teach'.
To encourage and upgrade teachers for innovative teaching skills, research and practice in Pharmacy.
To provide necessary facility, machinery, equipment, atmosphere and ambience that would enable quality academics, research and practice in Pharmacy.
To create an eco-system for professional competition and reward mechanism.
To prepare and encourage students for direction and career of their choice. Be it higher studies, entrepreneurship, employment, research and innovations.

admission_process.dpharm: H.S.C. with PCB / M or equivalent examination.
admission_process.bpharm_first_year: H.S.C. in PCB / M or equivalent with at least 45% marks & Non-Zero MHT-CET / Non-Zero Positive NEET Score.
admission_process.bpharm_direct_second_year: Passed Diploma in Pharmacy with at least 45% marks.
admission_process.mpharm: B.Pharm with at least 55% marks & Non-Zero Positive GPAT Score.

highlights: 3 students placed at D-Mart Pvt. Ltd. (Pharmacy), Mumbai.
6 students placed at Zeno Health, Mumbai.
4 students placed as Pharmacist Counsellors at Trumed Pvt. Ltd.
skill_development: 38 S.Y.D.Pharm students completed Coursera project on resume and cover letter building.
43 students completed three-month internships in community pharmacy.

library: Access to central KRRC library with extensive pharmaceutical resources.
scholarships: Same as engineering school – DTE Minority, EBC, Central Govt, State Reserved, Girls scholarship (page 52).

contact.address: Plot # 2 & 3, Sector-16, Near Thana Naka, Khandagaon, New Panvel, Navi Mumbai – 410206

fees.notes: Fees approved by Fees Regulating Authority (FRA), Maharashtra.

refund_policy.policy: Same as engineering school. If cancellation before cut-off date: full refund minus Rs. 1,000 processing fee. After cut-off: no refund except security deposit.

departments.name: Bachelor of Pharmacy
departments.vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice based School of Pharmacy that others would wish to emulate.

labs.name: Biotechnology Lab
labs.description: Area: 81 sq.m. | Equipped with microscopes, autoclave, incubator, BOD incubator, refrigerator, and laminar air flow (LAF) hood.

labs.name: Machine Room
labs.description: Area: 84 sq.m. | Cost: ₹30 Lakhs | Industrial pilot plant section equipped for mixing, sieving, milling, granulating, and QC testing.

labs.name: Pharmaceutics Lab-II
labs.description: Area: 83 sq.m. | Cost: ₹1.5 Lakhs | Equipped with hot air oven, electrical balances, microscopes, hot plates, and mechanical stirrers.

labs.name: Pharmaceutics Lab
labs.description: Area: 83 sq.m. | Fully equipped with instruments required for core pharmaceutics and cosmetics practicals.

labs.name: Pharmaceutical Analysis Lab
labs.description: Area: 83 sq.m. | Equipped with laboratory ovens, UV cabinet, water distillation unit, balance, and safety eye wash station.

labs.name: Pharmaceutical Chemistry Lab-II
labs.description: Area: 83 sq.m. | Features Godrej fume hood, triple beam balance, hot plate, muffle furnace, and conductivity meter.

labs.name: Pharmacology Lab
labs.description: Equipped with physiographs, organ baths, and simulated software for animal experiments and testing.

labs.name: Pharmacognosy Lab
labs.description: Equipped for extraction of crude drugs, botanical analysis, microscopical evaluation, and identification of medicinal plants.

faculty.name: Prof. Ajaaz A. S. Kutub Ali

alumni_testimonial.name: Mr. Mohammed Zaid Khan
alumni_testimonial.designation: Medical Business Associate, GSK Pharmaceuticals Ltd.
alumni_testimonial.quote: My time at AIKTC was enriched by the outstanding infrastructure and top-notch facilities. The well-equipped laboratories provided hands-on learning experiences that complemented theoretical knowledge perfectly.

departments.name: Diploma in Pharmacy
departments.vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice-based department of diploma pharmacy that others would wish to emulate.
mission_elements: To implement the Outcome Based Education (OBE) model.
To encourage innovative teaching skills, research and practice.
To provide necessary facilities for quality academic research.
To create ecosystem for professional competition and lifelong learning.
To prepare students for higher studies, entrepreneurship, employment, research.

labs.name: Biotechnology Lab
labs.description: Equipped with basic microbiological testing kits, autoclaves, and incubators.

labs.name: Pharmaceutics Lab
labs.description: Equipped with compounding apparatus, tablet machines, and quality control test rigs.

labs.name: Pharmaceutical Chemistry Lab
labs.description: Equipped for inorganic/organic chemistry synthesis, qualitative analysis, and titration setups.

labs.name: Pharmacology Lab
labs.description: Features anatomical models, charts, and basic organ bath setups for practical instruction.

achievements: Two student groups awarded ₹2 Lakhs in Maharashtra State Students Innovation Challenge.
Three students started their own start-up.

alumni_testimonial.name: Mr. Raju Madan Yadav
alumni_testimonial.quote: The solid academic foundation, hands-on training, and continuous mentorship I received during my D.Pharm program played a crucial role in shaping my career.

labs.name: Advanced Pharmacology Lab

labs.name: M.Pharm Research Lab
labs.description: Dedicated to postgraduate research projects, advanced formulation design, and analytical testing.

departments.faculty: Same as B.Pharm faculty; specialized guides for M.Pharm students as per university norms.
